Video.summary: Learn more about this infamous Robot and the family that built it. With an unforgettable design and devastating weapon, this competitor became an instant icon.
Video.title: Ultimate Collection: Hypno-Disc

Video.summary: Debuting in the Second Wars, to becoming the most successful Robot ever to take part in Robot Wars. This Robot put the squeeze on all the competition, including the House Robots.
Video.title: Ultimate Collection: Razer

Video.summary: Six robots come to the arena to try and best the challenges that await, including Skittles, where they must act as an autonomous bowling ball to knock over as many barrels as they can, whilst trying to avoid the house robots.
Video.title: The Second Wars - Heat A

Video.summary: Competitors have a chance to go head-to-head with a house robot in a test of strength and strategy in this week’s trial, tug of war. Winners progress to the next round, losers take a face first dive into the pit.
Video.title: The Second Wars - Heat B

Video.summary: This week’s trial takes the competitors back in time to medieval England, where they will joust against an unyielding house robot in hopes of winning a chance at the crown. The house robots team up to take down an unlucky competitor in the arena.
Video.title: The Second Wars - Heat C

Video.summary: Football returns to the arena in this week’s trial, complete with ferocious tackles, flamethrowers and own goals. In the semi-final, three of the house robots turn the arena into a barbeque.
Video.title: The Second Wars - Heat D

Video.summary: Competitors need to hold their own in King of the Castle, where they must defend a circle in the arena against the unforgiving house robots. How many will survive to make it to the semi-finals? A winner is decided by the pit in this week’s final.
Video.title: The Second Wars - Heat E

Video.summary: House robot, Shunt goes head-to-head with the competitors. It’s his job to remove the competitors from the ring by any means necessary in this week’s trial, Sumo. Will Shunt do the house robots proud, or will the competitors give him the slip?
Video.title: The Second Wars - Heat F

Video.summary: The gauntlet has a menacing addition, The Sentinel. Will the new robot prove to be a real obstacle, or an easy route to be exploited? The Skittles trial returns to the arena, but one competitor wants to take down more than just barrels.
Video.title: The Second Wars - Heat G

Video.summary: Football returns this week in the trial. New competitors enter the arena with high hopes of securing a place in the finals. The house robots show no mercy in the Gauntlet.
Video.title: The Second Wars - Heat H

Video.summary: Matilda’s tusks get put to good use against the competitors as jousting returns to the arena. Two competitors form a rivalry after a memorable battle in the semi-finals.
Video.title: The Second Wars - Heat I

Video.summary: Matilda takes centre stage again, as she attempts to pull as many competitors into the pit as possible in another tug of war. How will the competitors fair against the hazards of the arena and the merciless house robots?
Video.title: The Second Wars - Heat J

Video.summary: Competitors are once again tasked with defending their land in King of the Castle, will they defend their reign or be overthrown by the house robots? An even match in the semi-finals causes the house robots to forcefully decide a winner.
Video.title: The Second Wars - Heat K

Video.summary: Dead Metal takes to the ring to stop any competitors from progressing to the stage of the competition.
Video.title: The Second Wars - Heat L

Video.summary: First of the two Semi-Finals to determine which two of the six heat winners will progress to The Second Wars Grand Finals. The house robots are showing no mercy in the gauntlet and the competitors test their accuracy in this week’s trial, Pinball.
Video.title: The Second Wars - Semi Final 1

Video.summary: The last Semi-Final, competitors will once again battle the house robots in Pinball, evade them in the gauntlet and use them to destroy other competitors in the arena.
Video.title: The Second Wars - Semi Final 2

Video.summary: The Grand Final arrives, only the best robots have made it this far. The four remaining robots face two eliminators and a playoff. The two winners then face each other to determine who will be named champion of Robot Wars: The Second wars.
Video.title: The Second Wars - Grand Final

Video.summary: An insightful view into how Robot Wars Series 1 was created.
Video.title: The Second Wars - Making of Robot Wars

Image.alt: The Second Wars - Making of Robot Wars
The Second Wars - Making of Robot Wars
The Second Wars - Making of Robot Wars

Video.summary: Newcomers, veterans and a recent President enter the fray in this first Heat of the series. Competitors are eliminated left, right and centre and only the strongest will survive to compete in the finals.
Video.title: Series 10 - Heat A

Video.summary: A veteran only heat features the current reigning Champions, Carbide. Will Carbide’s streak be brought to an end by the other robots, more experienced and eager than ever?
Video.title: Series 10 - Heat B

Video.summary: Even the judges aren’t safe as two robots collide, sending shrapnel through the bullet-resistant shields around the arena. Two very different styles of robot meet in the finals.
Video.title: Series 10 - Heat C

Video.summary: One newcomer stares down seven veterans, will their induction into the arena be successful, or will their inexperience find them in the pit? One robot will have a second chance to qualify in the Redemption Round.
Video.title: Series 10 - Heat D

Video.summary: The final heat features only veterans, here for an opportunity to make up for their mistakes in the previous tournaments. Only one competitor will make it into the Grand Finals, and the others must suffer defeat, again.
Video.title: Series 10 - Heat E

Video.summary: After lengthy repairs and inspirational pep talks, the qualifiers prepare to fight for the title. A 10-way Robot Rumble will give the victor a spot in the Grand Finals, alongside the heat winners.
Video.title: Series 10 - Grand Final

Video.summary: The Grudge Matches gave competitors an opportunity to come back and settle some scores. A one-off episode featuring a variety of battles; Judgement Day, Reserve Rumble, Inferno Insurrection, Ramrombit, Super Showdown and Internet Insurrection.
Video.title: The Second Wars - Grudge Matches

Video.summary: Take a look back at the phenomenal second series, relive the highs and lows of the house robots and competitors of The Second Wars.
Video.title: The Second Wars - Best Of

Video.summary: Let the battle for the Third Wars crown commence. With the trials being replaced with all out combat, this series is set to be the most brutal yet.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat A

Video.summary: Teams from across the UK enter the arena in hopes of besting the house robots and making it to the Grand Final. The knockouts keep on coming as eight more competitors think they have what it takes to survive the Robot Wars.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat B

Video.summary: Eight fresh competitors ready to prove their mettle in the arena. Featuring a special event, Middleweight Melee, a single exhibition battle between five robots weighing under 45.4kg.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat C
